Useful for discovering which genotyping schemes are available for strain comparison and analysis in EnteroBase.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic with no summary. Missing context about MLST/wgMLST distinction, filtering capabilities despite 12 parameters, and what scheme information is returned. Added clarity about genotyping scheme types, query parameter support, and use case for AI agents to understand when to retrieve available schemes.

message: Semantic analysis completed: 30 operations analyzed, 30 quality issues found
